---
title: 'Ishmael'
date: '2020-04-04T06:39:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5107434525351014557'
blogger_filename: '/2020/04/ishmael.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<div class="WordSection1">  <p class="MsoNormal">Those bills are your Ishmael. Like Ishmael, I’ll bless them if you repent and ask me to. I’ll get you back out but this time the vision of the future peace has to be bigger than the felt-urgency of your current need. Selah.  <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p></div>
